Petition To Determine Entitlement To Estate Distribution [Probate Code 11700]
Off Calendar May-11-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Bridgeman, via ZOOM, counsel for Richard Nhul Morri, Co-Administrator; Kathy Moon, via ZOOM, counsel for Linda Foresti, Objector; Angelle Wertz, via ZOOM, counsel for Maurice Morri, Petitioner.

At the outset, the court queries Ms. Moon as to the status of her clients' petition. Ms. Moon advises that her petition should be in the court's efiling queue. The court confirms the preceding. The court queries Ms. Moon whether she has any objection to the court considering the petition to determine entitlement to estate distribution she confirms that she does not. The court then questions Mr. Bridgman regarding the adoptions. Mr. Bridgman reports that the adoption forms were signed and ready to file but that the decedent passed away before having the chance to do so which suggests equitable adoption.

After additional discussion, the Court takes the petition to determine entitlement to estate distribution under submission. Additionally, the court, on its own motion, continues the Accounting petition currently set in this matter for May 10, 2021 to June 23, 2021 at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Robert Woods; Bailiff: Deputy Tauscher. Not Reported. (D204)

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-29-2021 Continued To May-03-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Determine Entitlement To Estate Distribution [Probate Code 11700]
Off Calendar Mar-22-2021 Continued To Apr-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Angelle Wertz appeared by zoom for and with Maurice Morri by zoom.
Kathy Moon appeared by zoom for and with Linda Foresti (Objector) by zoom.
James Bridgman appeared by zoom for and with Richard Nuhl Morri by zoom.

Ms. Wertz asked if the Court received the two declarations that were recently filed, stated that her position as to Ms. Foresti's objection is that it should be dismissed in its entirety and that Ms. Foresti does not qualify as in interested person. Ms. Moon stated that her Client has standing because she is the closest relative of the Decedent. Ms. Wertz stated that adoption was filed in San Francisco and that she believes Mr. Bridgman filed a copy of the adoption certificate. The Parties presented oral argument to support their positions with respect to the issue of whether or not Ms. Moon's Client has any standing and whether Richard Nuhl is an Heir. Ms. Wertz provided information regarding amounts received by Maurice outside of this probate and provided history regarding the adoption. The Petition to Determine Entitlement to Estate Distribution is continued to April 26, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Ms. Wertz is to provide further briefing on Probate Code 6455 by April 5, 2021. The accounting petition that is currently calendar for March 29, 2021 is continued to May 3, 2021 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Discussion was also held regarding Ms. Moon filing further briefing on the issue of Ms. Foresti's standing.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

Off Calendar Jan-29-2020 Continued To Feb-26-20 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Bridgman for Richard Morri and specially appearing for Attorney Angelle Wertz on behalf of Richard Morri.

Mr. Bridgman stated that they are working on the petition and that he expects to file it within two-weeks. Status on close of estate is continued to February 26, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. Mr. Bridgman is to file either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration by February 19, 2020.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Jun-05-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: James Bridgman appeared by telephone for and with Richard Morri (present).
Angelle Wertz for and with Maurice Morri.
Kathy Moon for Linda Foresti.

The Court noted that Richard at least on papers appears as an adopted Son with equal priority. Mr. Bridgman stated that he has an agreement with Ms. Wertz that the two joint heirs administer the Estate, that Ms. Foresti is not an adopted Daughter and that she has no standing. Ms. Moon stated that she believes the adoption may lack validity and that an appointment of a third party would be appropriate. The Court stated that lack of any evidence to undercut the adoption papers, given the petition has been amended to co-administration and given the matter is submitted, the Court grants the Amended Petition for Letters of Administration and appoints the Co-Administrators (subject to review of the order). Ms. Wertz stated that bond has been waived by Richard and Maurice. The Court orders bond is waived subject to any proceeding showing that it is necessary. Status on close of estate is set for December 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Petition filed by Ms. Foresti and the petition filed by Richard are denied.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Continued To Apr-24-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Angelle K. Wertz for and with Maurice Morri (Petitioner)
Valerie A. Kraml specially appearing for Michael Rupprecht on behalf of Linda Foresti (Petitioner)
James Bridgman for and with Richard N. B. Morri

The Court noted that none of the petitions are procedurally ready to go forward. Ms. Kraml stated her client is willing to have a neutral third party appointed. Ms. Wertz stated her client would be willing to be co-administrator with Mr. Bridgman's client, but is not willing to withdraw his petition. Mr. Bridgman questions Ms. Foresti's standing and will be conducting some discovery. All three Petitions for Letters of Administration are continued to April 24, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204, during which time the parties can perfect their filings and talk to each other to see if they can reach an agreement.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera, Shirley Le. Deputy: V. Jung. Not reported.
